'''Taxtro Grave''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]].

==Biography==
Grave was stationed aboard the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. He used a [[T-28 repeating sniper rifle]], and joined the [[Hand of Judgment]] after he and his friends, [[Daric LaRone]], [[Korlo Brightwater]], [[Saberan Marcross]], and [[Joak Quiller]] were forced to leave (on a TL-1800 [[Suwantek Systems]] freighter) after the accidental [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agent [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Drelfin]]. He then, after leaving the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']], went to [[Drunost]] and stopped a swoop gang from attacking a farmer with brand new equipment. They then fled from [[Drunost]] and went to [[Janusar]] where they had their speeders confiscated and attacked [[Cav'Saran]] to get them back. They later found out that [[Cav'Saran]] was allied with a pirate gang known as the Bloodscars.

{{Char-stub}}
